clusters.justification: These terms consistently co-activate across the broad limbic and salience systems to support the generation, regulation, and clinical disruption of emotional states.
This cluster reflects the computation of subjective utility within striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry to guide motivated behavior, reward anticipation, and goal-directed choices.

These concepts map onto the convergence zones of the default mode network, which facilitates internally constructed representations regarding the self, autobiographical context, and other social agents.
